# 🌴 FLORIDA TRIP — CAR CHEAT SHEET (Aug 14–27, 2026)
*Keep in the glovebox. Rope-drop always · Midday break during the storm · Hydrate constantly.*

## 📞 EMERGENCY & KEY INFO (fill in before leaving)
| | |
|---|---|
| **Emergency** | **911** · Non-emergency police: 311 |
| **AAA Roadside** | **1-800-222-4357** (have member #: __________) |
| **Insurance (auto)** | Co: __________ Policy #: __________ Phone: __________ |
| **Insurance (health)** | Member ID: __________ Phone: __________ |
| **Poison Control** | 1-800-222-1222 |
| **Parents' phones** | Adult 1: __________ Adult 2: __________ |
| **Kids' info** | Allergies: __________ Meds: __________ Blood type: __________ |
| **Hotel tonight** | Name/addr: __________ Conf #: __________ |
| **Car** | Plate: ______ Yr/Make/Model: __________ Tire size: ______ |

## 🗓️ DAY-BY-DAY AT A GLANCE
| Date | Plan | Sleep | Rope-drop / key move |
|---|---|---|---|
| Aug 14 PM | Depart NJ, I-95 S | VA/SC | Leave ~8 PM or 4–5 AM |
| Aug 15 | Drive S | Florence/Santee SC or Savannah GA | Lunch: Buc-ee's/Cracker Barrel |
| Aug 16 | Arrive Orlando | Orlando | Grocery run → Disney Springs PM |
| Aug 17 | **Magic Kingdom** | Orlando | Gates 8:15 → Seven Dwarfs first |
| Aug 18 | **Hollywood Studios** | Orlando | Gates 8:00 → Slinky OR Rise first |
| Aug 19 | **FLEX**: Volcano Bay / rest / Disney Springs | Orlando | Sleep in, recharge |
| Aug 20 | **Islands of Adventure** | Orlando | Hagrid's FIRST (no Express) |
| Aug 21 | **Universal Studios FL** | Orlando | Gringotts (Diagon Alley) first |
| Aug 22 | **Epic Universe** | Orlando | Super Nintendo World FIRST |
| Aug 23 | Drive → Miami, South Beach | Miami | Depart 7 AM (Turnpike) |
| Aug 24 | **Key Largo** glass-bottom boat | Miami | Depart 7 AM; boat reserved 9 AM |
| Aug 25 | Miami AM → drive to KSC area | Titusville | Beach AM, depart ~noon |
| Aug 26 | **Kennedy Space Center** → drive N | Savannah/Florence | Gates 9 → Bus tour/Saturn V first |
| Aug 27 | Drive → NJ | 🏠 Home | Depart 6:30 AM |

## 🎢 ROPE-DROP ORDER (do these FIRST, in this order)
- **Magic Kingdom:** Seven Dwarfs → Peter Pan → Pooh → Big Thunder → Tiana's → Haunted Mansion → Pirates. *(TRON via 7 AM virtual queue / Individual LL)*
- **Hollywood Studios:** Slinky Dog Dash → Toy Story Mania → Millennium Falcon → **Rise of the Resistance** → Tower of Terror → Rock'n'Roller (15-yo).
- **Islands of Adventure:** **Hagrid's** → VelociCoaster (15-yo) → Hulk → Forbidden Journey → Spider-Man.
- **Universal Studios FL:** Gringotts → Mummy → Transformers → Rip Ride Rockit (15-yo).
- **Epic Universe:** Mario Kart + Donkey Kong (Nintendo) → Battle at the Ministry → Hiccup's Wing Gliders → Stardust Racers (15-yo).
- **Kennedy Space Center:** Bus Tour → Saturn V → Atlantis → IMAX → Astronaut Encounter.

## 🅿️ PARKING (Google Maps search terms) + COST
| Place | Search this | Cost |
|---|---|---|
| Magic Kingdom | "Magic Kingdom Transportation and Ticket Center" | $30 (tram → ferry/monorail) |
| Hollywood Studios | "Disney's Hollywood Studios Parking" | $30 (walk/tram) |
| EPCOT | "EPCOT Parking Plaza" | $30 |
| Disney Springs | "Disney Springs" | FREE |
| USF / IOA | "Universal Orlando Parking Garage" | $32 (FREE after 6 PM) |
| Epic Universe | "Epic Universe Parking" | $32 (separate lot!) |
| South Beach | "17th Street Parking Garage Miami Beach" | ~$20–30/day |
| Key Largo | "John Pennekamp Coral Reef State Park" | $8/car |
| Kennedy Space Center | "Kennedy Space Center Visitor Complex" | ~$10 |

## 🥵 DAILY RHYTHM (beats heat + crowds + storms)
1. **Rope drop** — at gates before opening (coolest, emptiest).
2. **Morning:** outdoor/thrill rides fast, one direction, no backtrack.
3. **Lunch 11 or 2** (mobile order 60 min ahead) — dodge the noon rush.
4. **1–4 PM storm/heat:** indoor rides + AC shows + hotel pool break.
5. **Evening:** re-ride favorites during parade/fireworks (lines drop), then fireworks.

## 💧 NEVER FORGET (day bag)
☐ Water bottles (refill free at counters) ☐ Power banks + cables ☐ Ponchos ☐ Cooling towels + fans ☐ Sunscreen + hats ☐ Snacks ☐ Cash + 1 card + ID ☐ Ziplocks (phones on water rides) ☐ Kid ID / phone # on 8-yo's arm ☐ Meds + band-aids

## ⛽ DRIVE-DAY RULES
- Refuel at **½ tank** · driver swap every ~2.5 hrs · GasBuddy for cheapest gas.
- NJ **E-ZPass** works I-95 north; FL = cashless "Toll-By-Plate" (budget ~$50).
- FL storms = slow down, lights on, don't stop under overpasses.
- **Never leave kids/pets in the car** — FL interior hits 130°F+ in minutes.

## 💰 MONEY QUICK-WINS
Hotel breakfast + kitchen · refill water · share big entrées · eat at Disney Springs/CityWalk · skip Park Hopper & Memory Maker · buy only 1–2 Individual Lightning Lanes (TRON, Rise) · bring your own beach chairs · use a garage in Miami (not valet).

## ✅ DECISIONS (already made for you)
- **Aug 19:** Skip full-day EPCOT → Volcano Bay (if in promo) or rest day.
- **Keys:** Base in Miami; day-trip **Key Largo** only (NOT Key West — 4 hrs each way).
- **Parks:** Drive your own car (not shuttle) — freedom to rope-drop & take breaks.
- **Line-skip:** Low-crowd August — rope-drop instead; buy Express only if wait times look bad week-of.
